title: Tithymalus gayi
taxonomy: Tithymalus gayi is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, commonly known as spurge. It belongs to the genus Tithymalus, which includes various species of spurge. The classification of Tithymalus gayi is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, and order Malpighiales. This plant is native to South America, specifically in the Andes mountains. The classification of Tithymalus gayi is subject to ongoing research and may be revised as new information becomes available.
